title: No, Not That Georgia. A.I. Compounds a Nation’s Identity Woes.
summary_full: Online queries are more likely to turn up references to the U.S. state — a problem for the republic in the Caucasus and its people. But a move to drop the name “Georgia” has lost steam.
summary_public: Online queries are more likely to turn up references to the U.S. state — a problem for the republic in the Caucasus and its people. But a move to drop the name “Georgia” has lost steam.

GE.label: neutral
